Featured Project

PhishGuard AI 🛡️

PythonXGBoostLightGBMStacking ML97% AccuracyCybersecurity

PhishGuard AI is a full Cyber Threat Intelligence Platform that detects phishing URLs using a stacking ensemble of 4 ML models. It includes a real-time dashboard, URL scanner, Visual AI analyzer, and Zero-Day intel feed.

Technical Architecture:

  • Stacking ensemble: Random Forest + XGBoost + LightGBM + CatBoost as base models
  • Meta-learner: Logistic Regression combining all predictions
  • 112 engineered features per URL (lexical, domain, page, statistical)
  • Final accuracy: 97.1% — outperforming all individual models
  • Live threat feed dashboard with real-time URL scanning UI
  • Visual AI module for screenshot analysis of fake websites
🐙 View on GitHub
Full Stack Project

DreamBite Restaurant 🍽️

FlaskPythonSQLiteFull StackFine Dining

DreamBite is a full-stack restaurant management platform for a Fine Dining & Bistro. Built from scratch with Flask and SQLite, featuring a gorgeous glassmorphism UI with a restaurant background.

Features built:

  • Homepage with live guest counter ("9 Guests Have Reserved With Us!")
  • Full menu system — Starters, Mains, Desserts, Drinks with Pakistani cuisine items
  • Chefs page with staff profiles (Chef Amina, Chef Bilal, Chef Zara)
  • Photo gallery with food photography grid
  • Reservation form — name, email, date, time, guests, occasion, seating preference
  • Feedback & Reviews system with star ratings
  • Admin login panel for restaurant owners
🐙 View on GitHub
UI/UX Design

Food Ordering App — Figma 🎨

FigmaUI/UXMobile Design4 Screens

A complete mobile food ordering app designed in Figma with 4 fully-designed screens following modern UX principles.

  • Screen 1: Welcome/splash with hero food image and CTA
  • Screen 2: Menu with search bar, category filters (All, Pizza, Dessert), promotions, and popular items
  • Screen 3: Product detail page with add-ons, quantity selector, and Add to Cart
  • Screen 4: Cart with item list, quantity control, total, and Checkout button
  • Purple brand color palette with clean white cards
  • Persistent cart icon in bottom navigation across all screens
